query:
-- Check unlinked billing items for key unbilled customers
SELECT bi.contactName, bi.description, bi.lineAmount, bi.serviceExternalId, bi.invoiceNumber
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.contactName IN (
  'Body Corporate for Osprey Mooloolaba CTS4773',
  'Middlemount Coal Pty Ltd',
  'Legrand AV Australia',
  'BrewDog Australia',
  'Cornwalls (QLD)',
  'Cornwalls'
)
ORDER BY bi.contactName, bi.lineAmount DESC
LIMIT 30;

-- Also check Salter Brothers Xero billing
SELECT bi.contactName, bi.description, bi.lineAmount, bi.serviceExternalId
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.contactName LIKE '%Salter%' OR bi.contactName LIKE '%Spicers%'
ORDER BY bi.lineAmount DESC LIMIT 20;
